description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a dark fence and featuring a spacious, landscaped yard. The structure has a light-colored exterior with a combination of large and small windows, and a dark, multi-gabled roof. The front area includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a main entrance with a pathway, and decorative shrubs and a blossoming tree. The backyard is expansive and mostly open lawn, with a wooden privacy fence along the rear. The side yards are landscaped with hedges and additional green space. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes open outdoor areas and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, decorative shrubs, and a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage doors, side windows, and the transition from front to backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, wooden privacy fence, and multiple rear-facing windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional green space, and the rear portion of the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
